mapper.update: INSERT INTO app_stats_counter (counter_key, counter_value) VALUES ('total_messages', 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE counter_value = counter_value + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
UPDATE app_message SET status = #{status}, content = #{content}, error_code = #{errorCode}, trace_id = #{traceId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_message WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_message SET st_message_ref = #{stMessageRef}, swipe_index = #{swipeIndex}, trace_id = #{traceId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE app_message SET message_kind = #{messageKind}, continue_from_message_id = #{continueFromMessageId}, trace_id = #{traceId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_message WHERE st_message_ref = #{stMessageRef} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY swipe_index ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE app_message SET status = 'DELETED', content = '', deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, trace_id = COALESCE(#{traceId}, trace_id), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM app_message WHERE st_message_ref = #{stMessageRef} AND swipe_index = #{swipeIndex} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND status IN ('QUEUED', 'GENERATING') AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND ( (role = 'user' AND COALESCE(status, '') NOT IN ('FAILED', 'DELETED')) OR (role = 'assistant' AND status IN ('SUCCESS', 'STOPPED')) )

SELECT MAX(id) FROM app_message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND ( (role = 'user' AND COALESCE(status, '') NOT IN ('FAILED', 'DELETED')) OR (role = 'assistant' AND status IN ('SUCCESS', 'STOPPED')) )
